content.question: Will the 2025-2035 birth cohort decline in Hungary follow the 2024-2025 trajectory of 7% annual contraction, stabilize at current levels, or reverse due to unobserved fertility-policy or migration effects?
content.reduction_path: Obtain multi-year KSH projections disaggregated by region and settle confidence intervals on 2030 cohort size; cross-check against comparable Central European demographic models (Poland, Czech Republic, Slovakia) to assess whether Hungary follows regional trend or diverges.
